canonical_name: Cell Migration Inducing hyaluronan Binding Protein
step_rationale: Atherosclerosis-induced gene with roles in vascular remodeling and inflammatory cell recruitment.
mechanism: CEMIP expression is induced during atherosclerotic plaque development and contributes to vascular inflammation and plaque progression.

references.title: Translatome profiling reveals Itih4 as a novel smooth muscle cell-specific gene in atherosclerosis.
